heading: Limitations
body:
`knnBeta` operator must be the top-level operator in your queries and
therefore, you can't use the `knnBeta` operator inside the following:

- [embeddedDocument](embedded-document-ref)

- [compound](compound-ref)

- [faceted navigation](fts-facet-ref)

You can't use the `knnBeta` operator to query fields indexed using a
[index definition](avs-types-vector-search) type index. You can't use
the [$search](pipe.$search) [sorting](sort-ref) option with the
`knnBeta` operator.

We don't recommend paginating your MongoDB Search results using [$skip](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/skip)
and [$limit](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/limit) after the [$search](pipe.$search) stage.
